title: Accounting Year totals schema
description: A schema for retrieving account totals for a specific accounting year.

items.title: Entry
items.description: A specific total for an account in the accounting year.

totalInBaseCurrency.description: The total entry amount in base currency for the accounting year.

self.description: A unique reference to the account resource.

fromDate.description: The first date in the period formated according to ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

toDate.description: The last date in the period formated according to ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

self.description: A unique reference to the account accounting year totals resource.
